testcase.name: testFetchAllDataReturnsResults
testcase.system-out:
15:09:03.846 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.eatclub.challenge.service.DealServiceTest]: DealServiceTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 15:09:03.983 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.eatclub.challenge.EatClubApplication for test class com.eatclub.challenge.service.DealServiceTest
